title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind demonstrated Antigravity, an agentic workbench that integrates frontier models with access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. The system coordinates models, literature, and data to accelerate research workflows from hypothesis to wet-lab experiment design in minutes.
